svg.title: NetTwin Analyser — enterprise network monitoring and cybersecurity simulation architecture
svg.desc: Top-to-bottom architecture diagram showing data flow from config files through parsing, topology building, traffic analysis, simulation, three parallel security modules, routing protocol analysis, and a visualization dashboard. Side labels show the tech stack: Python, NetworkX, Matplotlib, CLI monitoring, and cybersecurity simulation.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What router config file format does NetTwin support?')
g.text: Router configs · VLAN · Interface/IP details · Cisco IOS format

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the NetTwin config parser extract hostnames, IPs, VLANs, and routing protocols?')
g.text: Hostnames · IP extraction · VLAN detection · routing protocol detection

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does NetTwin build the NetworkX topology graph with nodes, edges, and subnet mapping?')
g.text: NetworkX graph · node/edge creation · subnet relationship mapping

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the NetTwin traffic analysis engine monitor?')
g.text: Link utilization · congestion · packet loss · latency analysis

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What failure scenarios can the NetTwin simulation engine model?')
g.text: Outage simulation · failed link detection · affected node analysis

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the NetTwin log analyzer detect warnings and critical security events?')
sendPrompt('How does the NetTwin ACL and firewall simulation work?')
sendPrompt('What attack scenarios does the NetTwin attack simulator support?')
sendPrompt('How does NetTwin detect OSPF, BGP, and RIP routing protocols?')
g.text: OSPF · BGP · RIP detection · protocol deployment summary

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the NetTwin AI anomaly detection engine work?')
g.text: Isolation Forest · Z-score ensemble · 12-feature vectors per node

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the NetTwin recommendation engine prioritize remediations?')
g.text: Prioritized fixes · CIS/NIST references · impact/effort scoring

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the NetTwin visualization dashboard display?')
g.text: Topology graph · traffic · security alerts · health metrics
REST API docs · GraphML export · CLI report

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me example NetTwin CLI commands')
sendPrompt('Show me the NetTwin REST API endpoints')
sendPrompt('What export formats does NetTwin support?')

svg.text: Legend — click any module to explore
